name: Caribbean Squash and Sweet Potato Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 small butternut squash (about 1 1/2 lbs.), peeled, seeded, cut into small chunks
1 pound sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into small chunks
2 sprigs parsley, finely chopped, for garnish
1-2 limes, cut into wedges, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions in water or balsamic vinegar.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except black beans, parsley, and limes. Cover.
3. Cook on medium-low heat until squash and potatoes are cooked, about 20 minutes.
4. About 10 minutes before serving, add black beans and cook to heat through.
5. Serve over rice, with parsley sprinkled over the top for garnish and a squeeze of lime.
